steps.title: Reverse the coupon to find the original total cost
steps.content: The cost after applying the $63 coupon was $27. To find the original total before the coupon, we add the coupon amount back: $$27 + 63 = 90$$ The original total cost was \$90.

steps.title: Divide by the number of bins to get the unit price
steps.content: Nasir bought 9 storage bins, each at the same price. The original total was $90, so the price per bin is: $$\frac{90}{9} = 10$$ The original price for one storage bin was \$10.
